commentaries.author: Augustine of Hippo
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh They showed his signs among them, and wonders in the land of Ham. Augustine of Hippo 18. "He set forth in them the words of His tokens, and of His wonders in the land of Ham" (ver. We ought not to understand by "the words of His tokens," words literally, words with which the tokens and wonders were worked, that is, which they uttered, that these tokens and wonders might take place. For many were performed without words, either with a rod, or with outstretched hand, or by ashes sent towards heaven.

commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
He gave. Hebrew, "they placed in them the words of their signs. "(Calmet) (Houbigant)
But the Chaldean and St. Jerome are conformable to the Septuagint. (Berthier)

advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
